summary: Tested Arc Wall feature in Composer (2D CAD tool). Arc wall drawing works correctly with click-drag-release. Arc Wall option is visible in Wall tool dropdown with both Radius and Chord Height input methods. Arc walls render with proper inner/outer edges and true SVG arc paths. Fixed missing addModule function bug. Arc-to-straight junction code is implemented but could not fully verify visually due to coordinate mapping issues with straight wall placement.

integration_issues.issue: Straight walls drawn at certain screen coordinates don't appear in the visible canvas area. The wall is created (console shows wallClickMode: waiting_end) but may be placed outside visible bounds.

passed_tests: Wall tool dropdown shows Arc Wall option with Circle icon
Arc Wall mode shows two input methods: Radius and Chord Height (String Height)
Arc wall drawing with click-drag-release creates wall successfully
Arc wall persists on canvas after creation
Arc wall renders with proper inner/outer arc edges (true SVG arc rendering)
Arc wall shows dimension labels (R1000mm | Xmm arc length)
Success toast appears: 'Arc wall created: Xmm arc length'
Flip Arc Direction button is available in Arc Wall options
Ortho Drawing toggle works in Draw Mode panel
Draw Mode panel shows all shape modes: Straight Wall, Rectangle Room, Square Room, Arc Wall
failed_tests: Arc-to-straight wall junction visual verification - could not place straight wall in same visible area as arc wall
action_items: Investigate coordinate mapping for straight wall drawing - walls may be placed outside visible canvas bounds
Verify arc-to-straight junction fill polygon rendering when both walls are in same visible area
Test arc wall endpoint connection detection (isArcEndpointConnected function)
critical_code_review_comments: arcStraightJunctions memo (lines 1116-1237): Properly detects arc-straight wall connections and computes fillPolygon geometry
isArcEndpointConnected helper (lines 1240-1244): Correctly checks if arc endpoint is connected to straight wall
Arc wall rendering (lines 5663-5760): Properly renders arc with conditional end cap strokes based on connection status
Junction fill rendering (lines 5320-5348): Renders fill polygons for seamless arc-straight junctions
FIXED: Added missing addModule function (lines 3918-3945) that was causing runtime error

success_rate.frontend: 85% - Arc wall features working, junction verification incomplete

seed_data_creation: Created arc walls during testing (not persisted - no Save clicked)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Arc wall drawing works with click-drag-release. To test arc-to-straight junction: 1) Draw a straight wall first, 2) Note the endpoint coordinates from console logs, 3) Draw arc wall starting from that exact endpoint. The coordinate system uses mm units with scale factor. Canvas coordinates need to be converted using the scale and panOffset. The arcStraightJunctions memo detects connections within CLOSURE_TOLERANCE (200mm).

arc_wall_drawing.evidence: Console logs show arc params calculated, success toast 'Arc wall created: Xmm arc length'

arc_wall_rendering.evidence: Arc walls render with proper inner/outer edges, dimension labels visible

arc_straight_junction_fill.reason: Could not place straight wall in same visible area as arc wall

arc_endpoint_connection_detection.reason: Requires both arc and straight wall at same endpoint

bug_fixed.description: The addModule function was being called but not defined, causing runtime error when clicking on canvas with module tool selected
